No GitHub mutations are recommended because the job blocks comment/label/close mutations, and none of the PRs has the complete merge preflight required for a merge recommendation. Security preflight reports no security-sensitive hydrated job refs.

repair_candidate.summary: Plan-only repair guidance for PRs with concrete blockers in this shard. No replacement PR should be opened yet because both repairable branches are contributor PRs with maintainer_can_modify=true and narrow diffs. Merge is not recommended for any item without a complete merge_preflight.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair ready-for-maintainer PR blockers for process.action and Zalo credential tests
repair_candidate.pr_body: This is a plan artifact, not an instruction to open a replacement PR immediately. Repair #81157 on the contributor branch by rebasing/updating against current main, rerunning Dependency Guard and the process.action malformed-input test, then collecting Codex /review preflight. Repair #90227 by addressing Copilot's actionable test robustness comments: make symlink skipping capability-based, guard symlink probe setup/cleanup failures, and split or rename the Windows private-permissions assertions. Preserve source PR attribution for @adone0 and @aniruddhaadak80 in any maintainer-authored repair path.
validation_commands: For #81157: rebase/update branch against current main, then run the targeted process-tool test covering malformed process.action and the repo dependency guard/preflight required checks.
For #90227: run the Zalouser credential test on Linux and Windows where available after addressing Copilot comments; at minimum run the targeted Vitest file plus formatting/diff checks.
credit_notes: Preserve @adone0 credit for source PR #81157 if a maintainer repair branch is needed.
Preserve @aniruddhaadak80 credit for source PR #90227 if a maintainer repair branch is needed.
